dashboard.label: Control Attestation
dashboard.description: Measurable NIST AI RMF control evidence — pass/fail per campaign week and workflow surface.

search.query: | inputlookup acme_control_matrix_lookup | eval campaign_week=campaign_week | join type=left campaign_week [ search `acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | where if("$campaign_week$"="*",1,campaign_week="$campaign_week$") | stats count as events latest(control.status) as observed_status latest(control.pass_rate_pct) as pass_rate by campaign_week ] | lookup acme_campaign_weeks_lookup campaign_week OUTPUT theme attack_class workflow_surface | eval attestation=if(isnull(events),"NOT_TESTED",if(observed_status="PASS","PASS","FAIL")) | table campaign_week theme attack_class workflow_surface control_id nist_function nist_subcategory pass_signal fail_signal attestation events pass_rate | sort campaign_week
